title: FLOSS Weekly 341: SatNOGs
summary:
Randal and Guillermo are joined by Pierros of SatNOGs this week to talk about the satellite networked open ground station.
SatNOGs is an open source ground station, optimized for modularity, built from readily available and affordable tools and resources.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
Thanks to CacheFly for providing the bandwidth for this podcast and Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
